concepts.finding: GANs consist of generator (produces fake samples) and discriminator (distinguishes real from fake) trained adversarially. Batch normalization stabilizes training by reducing internal covariate shift.
concepts.implication: Adversarial training framework can be applied beyond generation to training robust query representations invariant to certain transformations.
concepts.open_question: What transformations should query representations be invariant to (typos, synonyms, word order)?
concepts.testable_hypothesis: Adversarially trained query embeddings will be more robust to typos and paraphrasing than standard embeddings, maintaining 90%+ intent accuracy vs. 75%+ for standard embeddings.
